data.title: Microservices Structure
data.description: Adobe employs a microservices architecture allowing independent deployment and scaling of services.
data.technical_spec: Loosely coupled services, each with distinct functionalities.

data.title: Cloud-Native Approach
data.description: Adobe's services are designed to leverage cloud environments for scalability.
data.technical_spec: Use of containerization and orchestration tools.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Utilizes CDNs to ensure rapid delivery of content globally.
data.technical_spec: Edge servers spread across key geographic locations.

data.title: API-First Design
data.description: Design prioritizing APIs for integration and interoperability.
data.technical_spec: RESTful and GraphQL API standards used.

data.title: Data-Driven Architecture
data.description: Systems are built to process and analyze large volumes of data efficiently.
data.technical_spec: NoSQL databases and real-time data streaming.
